# Lighting Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- light type;
- mounting;
- illuminance;
- color temperature;
- field diameter;
- shadow management;
- camera/options;
- power requirements.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- datasheet;
- user manual;
- installation guide if public;
- options/accessory list.

## Key Characteristics

- Central illuminance;
- color rendering index;
- color temperature range;
- light field diameter;
- depth of illumination;
- LED lifetime;
- arm/mount type;
- camera integration.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Ceiling/wall/mobile mounts;
- camera modules;
- sterile handles;
- control panels;
- power/installation systems.

## Common Conflicts

- Illuminance differs by head configuration.
- Camera is optional.
- Mounting options change product identity.
- Installation guides may be separate documents.

## Review Notes

Lighting is lower clinical risk but installation/configuration claims still require documents.
